description: Child formula: one specialist reviewer (e.g. security, TypeScript, SQL) focused on a subset of changed files. The triage step of code-review bonds one of these per matched specialist. Not meant to be invoked directly — use code-review.

agent.description: Specialist agent name (e.g. typescript-reviewer, security-sentinel, code-reviewer)

files.description: Comma-separated list of files this reviewer should focus on

diff.description: The diff content to review (passed from triage to avoid re-fetching)

steps.title: [review-{{pr}}] {{agent}}: {{focus}}
steps.description: Run {{agent}} against PR {{pr}} in {{repo}}. Focus: {{focus}}. Files in scope: {{files}}. Report P1/P2/P3 findings with file:line references. Be concise — signal only.
